name: Seas of the Damned - Pirate RPG
description:
Welcome to the Foggy Archipelago

Located south of the continent of Anor, this land is shrouded in eternal fog and steeped in legends. Here, there are no kings, no laws—only the wind of freedom and the whispers of forgotten gods.

The archipelago is a haven for pirates, outlaws, and exiles, where every island holds its own secrets. In its harbors, life thrives: stolen goods are traded, crews are recruited for perilous raids, and rum flows freely alongside tales of lost treasures.

Bases of Influential Pirates

  • The Veiled Lair of Captain Ronan Creed: The legendary captain, known as the Ghost of the Archipelago, operates from a secret base hidden within a perpetually fog-shrouded caldera. His fleet of fast, silent ships strikes without warning and vanishes into the magic mist, making him both feared and revered.

  • Kraken's Grip Keep of Lady Anna The 'Iron Maiden' Rhodes: a city of pirates sprawling vertically upwards, its dark basalt walls appearing as a natural extension of the cliff itself. Access to it is a test of endurance and skill; the only approaches are a series of treacherous, zigzagging staircases carved directly into the rock, or heavy gate-lifts, powered by massive, roaring winches that hoist plunder and people from the docks below. Lady Rhodes commands respect through sheer force and her control over the archipelago's best shipwrights and blacksmiths.

  • The Sunken City of 'Mad' Jackal Finn: This isn't a fortress but a network of underwater caves and lagoons, accessible only through a dangerous labyrinth of submerged reefs. Finn and his crew of savage raiders use small, agile vessels to ambush ships from unexpected directions, believing the sunken ruins to be blessed by a forgotten sea god.

  • Fort Unbroken of Lady Elowen 'Viper' Brightmoor: An old but formidable Orynthian fort on a mid-sized island, seized by Elowen shortly after her escape.

Major Ports

  • Port of Skull's Cove (Southwest): Nestled in a hidden, serpentine bay, this port is the main hub for selling plundered goods and recruiting crew. Its taverns, like the Siren's Deceit, are always filled with rumors and the clamor of deals being made. The law here is enforced by the guild of smugglers known as the Shadow Syndicate.

  • Tidebreak Fortress (in the center of the archipelago): A massive fortress carved into the cliffs of the largest island. It serves as the de facto capital for the pirate fleets. The fortress is neutral ground where captains meet in the "Hall of Whispers" to settle disputes and form temporary alliances, all under the watchful eye of the fortress's mysterious warden.

  • Marooner's Dock (in the southeast): A sprawling, chaotic island settlement. It's a haven for pirates looking to lie low, repair their ships in hidden dry docks, and trade in information rather than gold. It's said that for the right price, you can disappear here forever.

Characters

Lady Elowen 'Viper' Brightmoor,
creator: nedugk
